title: deer-flow.forge.session.hypothesis_revised v1
description: A Forge session's hypothesis was revised — the trial card was regenerated. Producer: backend/packages/harness/deerflow/bus.py::emit_forge_session_hypothesis_revised. Subject is session_id. hypothesis_text truncated to 500 chars; expected_metric_delta truncated to 200.

hypothesis_text.description: the revised hypothesis text (truncated by producer)

expected_metric_delta.description: what the patron expects to observe if the hypothesis holds — typically a shell-runnable check

bead_id.description: beads id this session was opened for

trial_card_mode.description: rendering mode for the regenerated trial card
